column6: This two-way cake is a lifesaver for my oily skin. Keeps me matte all day!
Good everyday compact powder but needs a touch-up after 4 hours.
The lipstick is extremely pigmented and lasts through meals seamlessly.
Classic Lakme kajal. Very dark black and doesn't irritate my eyes.
The gloss looks nice and shiny but it feels quite heavy and sticky on the lips.
